overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through a dense, foggy forest at dusk. The scene features a moody blue-green color palette with atmospheric fog as the character explores the woodland environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense temperate forest trail with mixed birch and pine

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path, observing the surroundings while moving through the dense woodland

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through the forest with visible footprints and patches of grass
white-barked deciduous trees with sparse leaves lining the left side of the path
tall evergreen conifers visible in the distance through the fog
tall grass and ferns growing alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at dusk. Birch trees with distinctive white bark line the path while pine trees stand tall in the foggy distance. The atmosphere is moody and enclosed, with low light filtering through the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with scattered dead trees and mixed conifers

events.description: path curves slightly to the right, revealing more dead trees in the distance

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the trail, navigating the slight curve in the path as the forest composition shifts

entered.detail: leafless dead trees standing among the evergreens in the misty background

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through the forest with a slight rightward curve. The birch trees from the previous section fall behind as the path reveals more pine trees and scattered dead trees in the foggy distance. The ground remains a narrow dirt trail surrounded by dense grass undergrowth.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching large rock formation with open vista

events.description: large moss-covered rock formation becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches and passes a large rock formation on the right, continuing along the winding trail as the forest opens slightly

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder formation sitting beside the trail, approximately twice the height of the character

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues along the trail, a prominent moss-covered rock formation emerges from the fog on the right side of the path. The character walks past this large boulder while the forest vegetation shifts, with some trees falling behind and new birch trees appearing on the left. The path remains a narrow dirt trail but the surroundings feel slightly more open.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that shifts from a dense, enclosed woodland into a slightly more open landscape. It begins with Geralt walking a narrow dirt path lined by white-barked birch trees and towering pines shrouded in a moody, dusk-lit fog. As the trail curves gently to the right, the initial birch trees recede, giving way to a vista of scattered dead trees and thick grass undergrowth. The scene then expands as the camera passes a prominent moss-covered rock formation emerging from the mist, while new birch trees appear on the left. Finally, the surroundings open up slightly as the character continues forward along the dirt trail through the atmospheric forest.
